homeInfo.title: Audio Quality Evaluation
homeInfo.message:
Welcome to this audio quality evaluation test.

You will listen to 11 audio samples and answer 2 questions about each one.
Please use headphones and ensure you are in a quiet environment.

For each question, rate the audio on a scale from 1 (worst) to 7 (best).

Click the button below when you are ready to begin.

questions.name: Sample 1
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: solo acoustic nylon string guitar playing in a fingerstyle Brazilian bossa nova style.

prompts.0: How correct is the information in the caption with relation to the audio? Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, incorrect information) to 7 (best, accurate information)
prompts.1: Does this description contain information that is unrelated to the audio clip? Rate on a scale from 1 (entire caption completely unrelated to the audio clip) to 7 (completely related)

questions.name: Sample 2
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track is an aggressive heavy metal piece driven by distorted electric guitar riffs and powerful drumming. The fast-paced, loud sound creates a high-energy atmosphere well-suited for live concerts or intense video game combat sequences. While the source material identifies the artist as a hardcore punk band from Croatia, this specific segment showcases a distinctly heavier musical style.

prompts.1: Does this description contain information that is unrelated to the audio clip? Rate on a scale from 1 (entire caption completely unrelated to the audio clip) to 7 (completely related)

questions.name: Sample 3
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track is specifically designed for a techno club, featuring a steady, repetitive beat and a pulsating bassline driven by synthesizers. The music creates a dark and intense atmosphere with a hypnotic rhythm that maintains a sense of anticipation throughout the piece. Ultimately, its driving nature makes it an engaging choice for keeping an audience moving in a nightclub setting.

questions.name: Sample 6
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This piece is a perfect example of ambient electronic music that relies heavily on synthesizers and maintains a steady, slow tempo. The absence of vocals allows the listener to fully immerse themselves in an atmospheric soundscape characterized by repetitive beats and dreamy reverb effects. The overall mood remains chill and relaxing, creating an ideal environment for unwinding after a long day or setting a peaceful tone for a gathering.

The composition maintains a steady, pulsating beat while weaving complex melodies that suggest an atmosphere of experimentation and mystery without the need for vocals.

Ambient sounds of the natural world are woven throughout the composition, adding depth and a calming layer to the audio. The result is a soothing piece that effectively captures the serene feel of a recorded soundscape.

questions.caption: This instrumental track features a repetitive, catchy melody driven by a synthesizer and a strong beat that creates an energetic dance club atmosphere. Although labeled as Latin reggaeton in external records, the segment's primary character is an upbeat rhythm perfect for parties or retro video game soundtracks. The medium tempo ensures the music remains lively and engaging throughout the clip.

Recorded binaurally for an immersive headphone experience, the piece evokes a calm and meditative mood ideal for documentaries or travel vlogs about coastal landscapes.

questions.name: About You
questions.description: Please tell us about your musical background.

fields.label: How many years of musical experience do you have?
Please describe your musical experience (instruments played, training, listening habits, etc.)
fields.placeholder: e.g. I've played piano for 10 years and studied music theory in college...
